title: daphniphyllum glaucescens subsp. neilgherrense
intro: Daphniphyllum glaucescens subsp. neilgherrense is a subspecies of the Daphniphyllum glaucescens plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Daphniphyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Daphniphyllum glaucescens subsp. neilgherrense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves or stems of the plant.
